title: Decadent health bars (4 ingredients) – because it's a long weekend
excerpt: These moist, sweet cookies or bars are easy and delicious. I originally wanted to make a health bar, but then decided to be a little decadent and dress it up in a tempting coat of condensed milk. It's soft and your teeth sink right in. It leaves you wanting meeeeeeeeeeeeeer……… …

seo.title: Decadent health bars (4 ingredients) - because it's a long weekend - Marinda Kook

html:
These moist, sweet cookies or bars are easy and delicious. I originally wanted to make a health bar, but then decided to be a little decadent and dress it up in a tempting coat of condensed milk. It's soft and your teeth sink right in. It leaves you wanting meeeeeeeeeeeeeer………

 

INGREDIENTS:

  • 1 tin condensed milk
  • 500 ml ( 2 cups) oats
  • 250 ml ( 1 cup) coconut
  • 200g nuts or raisins or whatever seeds and berries you'd like to throw in

NOW:

  1. place the condensed milk in a mixing bowl and heat for 90 seconds in your microwave
  2. stir the rest of the ingredients into the condensed milk
  3. line a dish with foil and spray with non-stick Spray and Cook
  4. press the mixture nice and firmly into your dish – use your hands
  5. bake it in the oven for 20 minutes at 180 degrees Celsius
  6. let it cool and cut into blocks with a sharp knife

Look, if this doesn't satisfy your sweet tooth, nothing will. And it goes under the banner of a health bar!
